Variable.name: identityName
Variable.Description: The name of the identity object being modified.

Variable.name: applicationName
Variable.Description: The applicationName of the identity object being modified.

Variable.name: processName
Variable.Description: The process Name of the identity object being modified.

Variable.name: identityDisplayName
Variable.Description: The displayName of the identity being updated. This may be passed in, if not the script queries for this using a projection query and falls back to the name.

Step.name: Get Account Name
Step.Description: Get all list of users whose has mdstaff ascension application and immediately terminated

Step.name: Single Account Aggregation
Step.Description: Get all list of users whose has mdstaff ascension application and immediately terminated
